untranslatable_reason: Measured Move pattern requires multi-leg phase detection (first leg decline → corrective retracement to 68% → second leg steeper/faster) which cannot be expressed as single-bar indicator conditions. Pattern also specifies relative duration comparison (second leg ~50% time of first leg) and specific retracement levels that require multi-bar lookback logic beyond available indicators. Converted to approximate SHORT entry conditions based on downtrend acceleration and volume confirmation, but true pattern validation requires custom multi-leg detection logic.
